events.text:
>
{"decision": "fail", "risk": "high", "work_stage": "planned", "component_conditions": [], "percent_complete": 0, "value": 17.9, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 1.0, "event_time": 0.0, "rate": 0.0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["O2 reading 17.9% VOL is below the OSHA acceptable entry limit of 19.5% oxygen.", "Oxygen deficiency creates an asphyxiation hazard and may also indicate displacement by other gases."], "actions": ["Do not authorize entry until oxygen is raised to and maintained between 19.5% and 23.5% throughout the space.", "Ventilate the confined space and re-test at multiple depths/locations before any entry is considered.", "Verify calibration of the 4-gas monitor and ensure continuous monitoring is in place."], "rationale": "OSHA 1910.146(b)(2) defines a permit-required confined space as having a hazardous atmosphere, which includes an oxygen concentration below 19.5%. The pre-entry test shows 17.9% O2, which is outside acceptable entry limits and therefore entry cannot be authorized until corrected and re-verified.", "references": ["OSHA 1910.146(b)(2)", "OSHA 1910.146(c)(5)(ii)(C) - acceptable entry conditions: oxygen 19.5-23.5%"]}
